case_title: KYLE HEISE ET AL VS. JI QIAN YAN

docket_entries.description: SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEISE, KYLE ROSEN, BELINDA AS TO DEFENDANT YAN, JI QIAN (JUDY)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-05-2021 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-05-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-05-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF KYLE HEISE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF BELINDA ROSEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JI QIAN YAN IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JIN XIA TAN, WIFE. JI QIAN YAN IS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAN. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) (RE: REQUEST TO DENY PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT YAN, JI QIAN (JUDY)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEISE, KYLE ROSEN, BELINDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YAN, JI QIAN (JUDY) $147.84 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $272.84, PLEASE SEE ATTACHED MC-025 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATIFACTION OF JUDGMENT -SIGNED BY PLANTIFF FILED BY DEFENDANT YAN, JI QIAN (JUDY)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HEISE, KYLE ROSEN, BELINDA AS TO DEFENDANT YAN, JI QIAN (JUDY) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-05-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
